# Whalesborough Farm Resort & Spa

> Five-star luxury self-catering resort on a 428-acre working Cornish farm near Bude, North Cornwall. 26 award-winning dog-friendly cottages, 22 Arvor Suite wellness packages, The W Club Spa, The Weir farm-to-fork restaurant, and an organic market garden — all on one privately owned estate.

Location: Whalesborough Farm, Marhamchurch, Bude, Cornwall, EX23 0JD, United Kingdom
Phone: 01288 361940
Awards: Cornwall Tourism Gold 2024/25, VisitEngland 5-Star

## Stay
- [Our Cottages](https://www.whalesborough.co.uk/our-cottages/): 26 cottages sleeping 2–10+, all dog-friendly, all five-star, all include W Club Spa access
- [Arvor Suites](https://www.whalesborough.co.uk/arvor-suites/): 22 wellness self-catering suites from £175pp/night
- [Holiday Home Ownership](https://www.whalesborough.co.uk/holiday-home-ownership/): own a managed lodge on the estate
- [Dog-Friendly Breaks](https://www.whalesborough.co.uk/dog-friendly-breaks/): every cottage welcomes up to 2 dogs at no extra charge
- [Family Holidays](https://www.whalesborough.co.uk/family-holidays/)
- [Couples Breaks](https://www.whalesborough.co.uk/couples-breaks/)
- [Wellness Breaks](https://www.whalesborough.co.uk/wellness-breaks/)
- [Short Breaks](https://www.whalesborough.co.uk/short-breaks/)
- [Group Stays](https://www.whalesborough.co.uk/groups/)

## Experience
- [The Weir Restaurant](https://www.whalesborough.co.uk/weir-restaurant/): farm-to-fork lakeside dining
- [W Club Spa](https://www.whalesborough.co.uk/spa-and-treatments/): heated indoor pool (29–30°C), outdoor pool (17m × 8m, 26°C summer), sauna, steam room, Technogym fitness suite, Gaia treatments
- [Exploring Cornwall](https://www.whalesborough.co.uk/exploring-cornwall/): coastal walks, family days out, dog walks
- [Outdoor Activities](https://www.whalesborough.co.uk/outdoor-activities/)
- [Facilities for Kids](https://www.whalesborough.co.uk/facilities-for-kids/)
